description: Canonical routing benchmark for /do router regression testing. Each test case pairs a natural-language request with its expected agent and/or skill. Used to detect silent routing regressions when models or routing tables change.

test_cases.request: push my changes to GitHub
test_cases.notes: Git push intent — force-route to pr-sync

test_cases.request: push back on this approach
test_cases.notes: Disagreement, not git push — must NOT route to pr-sync

test_cases.request: commit these files
test_cases.notes: Git commit intent — force-route to git-commit-flow

test_cases.request: commit to this approach and move forward
test_cases.notes: Decision/dedication, not git commit — must NOT route to git-commit-flow

test_cases.request: did CI pass on my PR?
test_cases.notes: CI status check — force-route to github-actions-check

test_cases.request: check my logic in this function
test_cases.notes: Code review, not CI check — must NOT route to github-actions-check

test_cases.request: submit a PR with full review gates
test_cases.notes: Full PR workflow with gates

test_cases.request: clean up my merged branches
test_cases.notes: Post-merge branch cleanup

test_cases.request: debug the goroutine leak in the worker pool
test_cases.notes: Go domain + debug verb — agent + skill pairing

test_cases.request: write table-driven tests for the parser
test_cases.notes: Go tests — force-route to go-testing

test_cases.request: add a worker pool with goroutines
test_cases.notes: Go concurrency — force-route to go-concurrency

test_cases.request: wrap errors with fmt.Errorf and %w
test_cases.notes: Go error handling — force-route to go-error-handling

test_cases.request: review this Go PR for quality
test_cases.notes: Go code review — force-route to go-code-review

test_cases.request: work on the SAPCC Go repository go-bits
test_cases.notes: SAPCC Go repo — force-route to go-sapcc-conventions

test_cases.request: add auth middleware to the Python Flask API
test_cases.notes: Python domain task — routes to Python agent

test_cases.request: run ruff and mypy on this Python project
test_cases.notes: Python quality checks — routes to python-quality-gate

test_cases.request: write pytest fixtures for the database layer
test_cases.notes: Python testing — routes to Python agent

test_cases.request: fix the React component rendering bug
test_cases.notes: React/frontend domain — routes to TS frontend agent

test_cases.request: debug the async race condition in TypeScript
test_cases.notes: TypeScript debugging — specialized TS debug agent

test_cases.request: fix the typo in main.go
test_cases.notes: Mechanical one-character fix — force-route to fast

test_cases.request: rename this variable across the file
test_cases.notes: Trivial rename — force-route to fast

test_cases.request: add a --verbose flag to the CLI
test_cases.notes: Small self-contained change — force-route to quick

test_cases.request: extract this block into a helper function
test_cases.notes: Contained refactor — force-route to quick

test_cases.request: design a rate limiter feature for the API
test_cases.notes: New feature entry point — force-route to feature-design

test_cases.request: plan the implementation for this feature
test_cases.notes: Feature plan phase — force-route to feature-plan

test_cases.request: build the feature from the plan
test_cases.notes: Feature implementation — force-route to feature-implement

test_cases.request: run quality gates on the implemented feature
test_cases.notes: Feature validation — force-route to feature-validate

test_cases.request: migrate our Grafana dashboards to Perses
test_cases.notes: Grafana-to-Perses migration — force-route

test_cases.request: create a new Perses dashboard for API latency
test_cases.notes: Perses dashboard creation — agent + skill pairing

test_cases.request: lint this Perses dashboard definition
test_cases.notes: Perses lint — force-route to perses-lint

test_cases.request: create a new Perses panel plugin
test_cases.notes: Perses plugin creation — force-route

test_cases.request: comprehensive code review from multiple perspectives
test_cases.notes: Multi-reviewer parallel review

test_cases.request: roast this design doc
test_cases.notes: Multi-persona critique via roast skill

test_cases.request: fix these 3 failing test files simultaneously
test_cases.notes: Multiple independent failures — parallel dispatch

test_cases.request: execute the plan using subagents
test_cases.notes: Explicit subagent execution request

test_cases.request: research the topic thoroughly then write an article
test_cases.notes: Research-backed article — pipeline skill

test_cases.request: remove AI patterns from this blog post
test_cases.notes: De-AI editing task

test_cases.request: deploy the app to Kubernetes with Helm
test_cases.notes: K8s domain — routes to kubernetes-helm-engineer

test_cases.request: set up Prometheus alerting rules
test_cases.notes: Monitoring domain — routes to prometheus-grafana-engineer

test_cases.request: moderate the subreddit modqueue
test_cases.notes: Reddit moderation task

test_cases.request: create a new Claude Code skill with quality gates
test_cases.notes: Skill creation — skill-creator handles the full eval-driven workflow

test_cases.request: create a new hook for PostToolUse events
test_cases.notes: Hook creation — agent + pipeline pairing

test_cases.request: go ahead and fix the bug
test_cases.notes: 'go' as verb, not Go language — must NOT route to golang-general-engineer

test_cases.request: debug the goroutine leak causing memory issues
test_cases.notes: Go debug + goroutine force-route — primary skill is systematic-debugging, go-concurrency should be stacked via force-route
